title: Evaluation Result
description: Simplified canonical evaluation result record used by the artifact_emitter helper. Complements the full evaluation_manifest contract with a lightweight data-backbone record.

evaluation_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation result.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact that was evaluated.

action_required.description: Whether this evaluation requires a follow-up work item.

rationale.description: Explanation of the evaluation outcome. Required in all cases.

linked_work_item_id.description: ID of the work item created from this evaluation. Required (non-null) when action_required=true.
